rationale: Educ. Code §39.001 governs commissioner rulemaking procedure and declaratory judgment timelines. It does not address homestead exemptions or tax appraisal values, so no conflict arises.
quote: The commissioner shall adopt rules as necessary to administer this chapter.
_note: No direct or indirect conflict; §39.001 is procedural and does not reference Tax Code §11.13 or homestead exemption amounts.
